inputs.label: Present Value (PV)
inputs.businessContext: The initial amount of money or investment.

businessContext_i18n.en: The initial amount of money or investment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yatırılan veya borç alınan başlangıç para miktarı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der anfängliche Geldbetrag oder die Investition.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant initial de l'argent ou de l'investissement.

businessContext_i18n.es: La tasa de interés nominal anual.

inputs.label: Number of Years
inputs.businessContext: The total number of years the money is invested or borrowed.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total number of years the money is invested or borrowed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Paranın yatırıldığı veya borç alındığı toplam yıl sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Gesamtzahl der Jahre, in denen das Geld investiert oder geliehen wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'années pendant lesquelles l'argent est investi ou emprunté.

inputs.label: Compounding Frequency
inputs.businessContext: The number of times compounding occurs per year (e.g., 12 for monthly, 4 for quarterly).

businessContext_i18n.en: The number of times compounding occurs per year (e.g., 12 for monthly, 4 for quarterly).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık bileşik faiz sayısı (örneğin, aylık için 12, üç aylık için 4).
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Anzahl der Zinseszinsperioden pro Jahr (z. B. 12 für monatlich, 4 für vierteljährlich).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de capitalisations par an (ex. : 12 pour mensuel, 4 pour trimestriel).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
